'''鈭歡-sh-l''' ('''kagashal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:starken|starken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:starken|starken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-sh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kagashal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigashal|thigashal]] || [[word:jigashal|jigashal]] || [[word:shigashal|shigashal]] || [[word:kigashal|kigashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugashal|thuthugashal]] || [[word:jujugashal|jujugashal]] || [[word:shushugashal|shushugashal]] || [[word:kukugashal|kukugashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugashal|thugashal]] || [[word:jugashal|jugashal]] || [[word:shugashal|shugashal]] || [[word:kugashal|kugashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugashal|thugashal]] || [[word:jugashal|jugashal]] || [[word:shugashal|shugashal]] || [[word:kugashal|kugashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegashal|thegashal]] || [[word:jegashal|jegashal]] || [[word:shegashal|shegashal]] || [[word:kegashal|kegashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogashal|thothogashal]] || [[word:jojogashal|jojogashal]] || [[word:shoshogashal|shoshogashal]] || [[word:kokogashal|kokogashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogashal|thogashal]] || [[word:jogashal|jogashal]] || [[word:shogashal|shogashal]] || [[word:kogashal|kogashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogashal|thogashal]] || [[word:jogashal|jogashal]] || [[word:shogashal|shogashal]] || [[word:kogashal|kogashal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]] || [[word:gashal|gashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gashal|th忙gashal]] || [[word:j忙gashal|j忙gashal]] || [[word:sh忙gashal|sh忙gashal]] || [[word:k忙gashal|k忙gashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagashal|thathagashal]] || [[word:jajagashal|jajagashal]] || [[word:shashagashal|shashagashal]] || [[word:kakagashal|kakagashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagashal|thagashal]] || [[word:jagashal|jagashal]] || [[word:shagashal|shagashal]] || [[word:kagashal|kagashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagashal|thagashal]] || [[word:jagashal|jagashal]] || [[word:shagashal|shagashal]] || [[word:kagashal|kagashal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagashal|shagashal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagashal|goshagashal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagashal|gokishagashal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagashaln眉|shagashaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagashalnkn眉|goshagashalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashaln眉|gokishagashaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagashalsh毛|shagashalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagashalnksh毛|goshagashalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagashalsh毛|gokishagashalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashalro|shagashalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashalnkro|goshagashalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashalro|gokishagashalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashalmu|shagashalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashalnkmu|goshagashalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashalmu|gokishagashalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagashalsher|shagashalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagashalnksher|goshagashalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagashalsher|gokishagashalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagashalng|shagashalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagashalnkng|goshagashalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagashalng|gokishagashalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagashalya|shagashalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagashalnkya|goshagashalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagashalya|gokishagashalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagashalyam|shagashalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagashalnkyam|goshagashalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagashalyam|gokishagashalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashaln眉sh毛|shagashaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashalnkn眉sh毛|goshagashalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashaln眉sh毛|gokishagashaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashaln眉ro|shagashaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashalnkn眉ro|goshagashalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashaln眉ro|gokishagashaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashaln眉mu|shagashaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashalnkn眉mu|goshagashalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashaln眉mu|gokishagashaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashalsh毛n眉|shagashalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashalnksh毛n眉|goshagashalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashalsh毛n眉|gokishagashalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashalsh毛ro|shagashalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashalnksh毛ro|goshagashalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashalsh毛ro|gokishagashalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashalsh毛mu|shagashalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashalnksh毛mu|goshagashalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashalsh毛mu|gokishagashalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashalron眉|shagashalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashalnkron眉|goshagashalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashalron眉|gokishagashalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashalrosh毛|shagashalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashalnkrosh毛|goshagashalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashalrosh毛|gokishagashalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagashalromu|shagashalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagashalnkromu|goshagashalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagashalromu|gokishagashalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagashalmun眉|shagashalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagashalnkmun眉|goshagashalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagashalmun眉|gokishagashalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagashalmush毛|shagashalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagashalnkmush毛|goshagashalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagashalmush毛|gokishagashalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagashalmuro|shagashalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagashalnkmuro|goshagashalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagashalmuro|gokishagashalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
